rules.title: Approved consolidated baseline methodology ACM0010
rules.logic: Approved consolidated baseline methodology ACM0010

rules.title: • The annual average temperature in the site where the anaerobic manure treatment facility in the baseline existed is higher than 5°C.
rules.logic: • The annual average temperature in the site where the anaerobic manure treatment facility in the baseline existed is higher than 5°C.

rules.title: For each alternative baseline scenario, the internal rate of return (IRR) and/or the net present value (NPV) should be calculated.
rules.logic: For each alternative baseline scenario, the internal rate of return (IRR) and/or the net present value (NPV) should be calculated.

rules.title: BEN2O,y Annual baseline N2O emissions in t CO2e / yr GWPN2O Global Warming Potential (GWP) for N2O.
rules.logic: BEN2O,y Annual baseline N2O emissions in t CO2e / yr GWPN2O Global Warming Potential (GWP) for N2O.

rules.title: small-scale project activity (15 MW), the method for the calculation of the grid emission factor in the simplified baseline methodology for small-scale CDM project activity AMS.I.D could be used.
rules.logic: small-scale project activity (15 MW), the method for the calculation of the grid emission factor in the simplified baseline methodology for small-scale CDM project activity AMS.I.D could be used.

rules.title: LFAD Methane leakage from Anaerobic digesters, default of 0.15 multiplied by methane content of biogas.
rules.logic: LFAD Methane leakage from Anaerobic digesters, default of 0.15 multiplied by methane content of biogas.

rules.title: LT Index for livestock type B0,LT CH4 production capacity from manure for livestock type LT, in m3 CH4/kg-VS, to be chosen based on procedure provided for in the baseline methodology section.
rules.logic: LT Index for livestock type B0,LT CH4 production capacity from manure for livestock type LT, in m3 CH4/kg-VS, to be chosen based on procedure provided for in the baseline methodology section.

rules.title: • In case the electricity is generated in an on-site fossil fuel fired power plant in the baseline, the default emission factor for a diesel generator with a capacity of more than 200 kW for small-scale project activities should be used ...
rules.logic: • In case the electricity is generated in an on-site fossil fuel fired power plant in the baseline, the default emission factor for a diesel generator with a capacity of more than 200 kW for small-scale project activities should be used (0.8 tCO2/MWh, see Table I.D.1 in the simplified baseline and monitoring methodology AMS.I.D for selected small-scale CDM project activity categories).

rules.title: RN,n Fraction of NEX in manure waste that is reduced in the Baseline AWMS.
rules.logic: RN,n Fraction of NEX in manure waste that is reduced in the Baseline AWMS.

rules.title: • Flare operation, i.e., time of the year when the flare is operational when the biogas is flowing through the flare; • Concentration of methane in biogas at outlet of anaerobic digester; • Concentration of methane in flue gases of the f...
rules.logic: • Flare operation, i.e., time of the year when the flare is operational when the biogas is flowing through the flare; • Concentration of methane in biogas at outlet of anaerobic digester; • Concentration of methane in flue gases of the flare; • Biogas leakage in project: through leaks in the pipeline during transportation of biogas.

rules.title: Leakage: • Nitrogen concentration and COD in waste water/sludge disposed outside the project boundary;

rules.title: QA/QC procedures: --- Any comment: If it is required to use developed country VS values, the following should be monitored: - Genetic source of the production operations livestock originate from an Annex I Party; - The formulated feed ra...
rules.logic: QA/QC procedures: --- Any comment: If it is required to use developed country VS values, the following should be monitored: - Genetic source of the production operations livestock originate from an Annex I Party; - The formulated feed rations (FFR).
